{{Quote|Alert all commands. Deploy the fleet.|Admiral Firmus Piett's orders to Hurdiss|<ref name="ESB" />}}
'''Hurdiss''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[communications chief]] aboard the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor-class'' Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was one of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy's]] many [[Technician/Legends|communication specialists]], and he coordinated and monitored [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] movements during challenging tactical situations. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Hurdiss was aboard the ''Executor'' during the [[Warship/Legends|warship's]] pursuit of the fugitive [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] through the [[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]].

==Biography==
Hurdiss, a [[Human/Legends|Human]],<ref name="ESB" /> was a [[Technician/Legends|communication specialist]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During challenging tactical situations, he coordinated<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Dagobah Limited|cardname=Comm Chief}}</ref> and monitored [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] movements.<ref name="BTM">''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]''</ref> Hurdiss was the [[communications chief]] aboard<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor-class'' Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]],<ref name="ESB" /> by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref>

Following a [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid's]] discovery of the hidden [[Echo Base/Legends|Rebel base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] that same year, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] launched a [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|ground assault]] during which the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was forced to retreat from their headquarters on the planet. Following the victory, the ''Executor'', along with the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] of Vader's personal fleet, [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]], pursued the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]—carrying the fugitive Rebel operatives [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]—after the [[Starship/Legends|vessel's]] escape into the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]]. [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] Hurdiss served aboard the ''Executor''{{'s}} command [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] during the pursuit and was present at his console when the [[Warship/Legends|warship]] lost the ''Millennium Falcon'' near the [[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]]. Vader ordered [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]]—the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought's]] [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]]—to detect all possible escape routes the ''Millennium Falcon'' could have taken, and to deploy Death Squadron in pursuit. Piett relayed the orders to deploy the Imperial fleet to Hurdiss, who responded and helped the Admiral carry out his commands. The ''Executor'', along with the rest of Death Squadron, dispersed into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in search of the ''Millennium Falcon''.<ref name="ESB" />

==Personality and traits==
Hurdiss was fair-skinned with dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="ESB" />

==Equipment==
Hurdiss wore a [[Color/Legends|light gray]] technician's uniform and a dark gray [[Hat/Legends|cap]] with a [[headset comlink]].<ref name="ESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hurdiss first appeared as a technician on the ''Executor'' during the Empire's Hoth campaign in [[1980]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], wherein he was played by an uncredited extra.<ref name="ESB" /> In [[April]] 1980, shortly before the film's release, Hurdiss appeared in a film still in ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Storybook]]'', a young readers' adaptation of the movie.<ref name="ESB story">''[[The Empire Strikes Back Storybook]]''</ref> In April [[1997]], Hurdiss was given a name and a brief backstory by the [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/Dagobah-Dark/large/commchief.gif "Comm Chief" card] released in the ''[[Dagobah Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
